# Marky v0.0.4

### New Features

- **Auto-Updater Support**: Added Tauri auto-updater support. Configured updater artifacts, GitHub release metadata, and wired the Tauri updater plugin. Added in-app update checks within the Settings, sidebar, and toast progress notifications.
- **Note History Diff Viewer**: Introduced a side-by-side diff viewer to the note history modal. This update includes a zero-dependency line-diff utility, Diff/Raw toggle, inline diff highlights, and diff statistics, enabling users to preview changes before restoring a snapshot safely.

### Bug Fixes & Improvements

- **UI Tweaks**: Fixed an issue causing update icons to appear janky.
- **Build Improvements**: Fixed a warning regarding the unused `Manager` import in `main.rs` during the build process.
